ab: magal hi myan sami qutux ngasal.
en: There are five people in our family.

ab: sami qutux ngasal ga ciwal(cyugal) sami mtswe.
ch: 我們家有三個兄弟姊妹。
en: There are three brothers and sisters in our family.

ab: nyux saku mluw maki beh yaba yaya qbsuyan muw mlikuy ka kneril.
ch: 我跟爸爸、媽媽、哥哥和姊姊住在一起。
en: I live with my father, mother, brother and sister.

ab: wagiq yaba muw, cyux m’Kinsat yaba muw.
ch: 我的爸爸很高，我的爸爸是警察。
en: My father is tall and he is a policeman.

ab: hlawax yaya muw, cyux m’Sinsiy na mita nbu’ yaya muw.
ch: 我的媽媽很瘦，我的媽媽是醫生。
en: My mother is thin and my mom is a doctor.

ab: maki ngasal ga skayal saku nya ke tayal yaba muw.
ch: 爸爸在家會和我們說族語。
en: My father speaks the tayal language with us at home.

ab: mhngaw ’bagan ga musa sami qalang rgyax.
en: We will all go back to the tribe during the summer vacation.

ab: sami ka qbsuyan muw ga msqun sami musa kmyap qpatung.
ch: 我和兄姊會一起抓青蛙。
en: My brothers and sisters and I will catch frogs together.

ab: blaq maku balay sami qutux ngasal.
en: I like our family very much.
